expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: The horizontal navigation tab bar clips the last visible item 'Hot Gam...' mid-word, and additional tabs beyond are not visible or indicated clearly.

Game cards in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge, with game titles partially hidden (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...').

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention text content accuracy or spelling errors; all reported issues concern layout/clipping problems.
